mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, submitter_id, data_json, status, approver_id, approved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM form_submission WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, template_id, submitter_id, data_json, status, approver_id, approved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM form_submission WHERE submitter_id = #{submitterId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, template_id, submitter_id, data_json, status, approver_id, approved_at, created_at, updated_at FROM form_submission WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
